DISCOVERY 302, HEARING IS HELD. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS JOHN DOE, JANE DOE'S MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF ELECTRONIC COMMUNICATIONS IS GRANTED IN PART. THE ORDER PROPOSED BY THE COURT IS ACCEPTED BY ALL PARTIES WITH MINOR CHANGES. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312 TO JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN AT SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: W. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Electronic Communications; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony F. Maul, Esq., The Maul Firm P.C., Telephone 510-496-4477, appearing for Plaintiff (CourtCall);
Joann L. Storey, Esq., Hinshaw 7 Culbertson, LLP, Telephone 415-362-6000 appearing for Defendant United Behavioral Health (CourtCall);

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS JOHN DOE, JANE DOE'S Motion To Compel Production Of Electronic Communications

Granted in part. The order proposed by the Court is accepted by all parties with minor changes. Plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order that complies with CRC 3.1312 to Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Off Calendar May-28-2019 Continued To Jun-04-19 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony F. Maul, esq. (510-496-4477) for Plaintiff.
Joanna L. Storey, esq. (415-263-8143) of Hinshaw for Defendant.

Counsel do not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.
ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFs JOHN DOE and JANE DOE's Motion To Compel Production Of Electronic Communications

The matter is continued to June 4, 2019 at 11:00 am in Department 301, Discovery Department for further arguments. Counsel may appear by court call if they desire. Parties to meet and confer referable to issues raised at the hearing. Counsel may stipulate to Judge Pro Tem at next hearing date or continue matter to Dept 302 with JPT's recommendation and report.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
